feedItems.description: allocated £3.6m to Planning & Development (≈£30 per resident)
allocated £6.4m to Environment & Streets (≈£52 per resident)

allocated £5.2m to Council Running Costs (≈£43 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £74 (3.4%) to £2261
